content.en:
"Let's get started!"

Ye Tianyi Nian accepted the gift of the origin of heaven and earth.

Bang!!!!

In the depths of endless time and space, there seemed to be a massive amount of origin pouring down, pouring into Ye Tian's body, refining his whole body.

His cultivation was rapidly improving, and the aura on his body was getting stronger and stronger.

During this period, Ye Tian was also devouring all kinds of resources, just to raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Dao Realm as soon as possible.

Even if it's a bit wasteful, it has to be done in order to improve one's cultivation.

Finally, when the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift was about to be exhausted, Ye Tian finally felt that there was no way to advance in cultivation.

This is the peak cultivation of the Dao Realm!

"It's finally this point!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this level, he can go to the double realm of the Dao realm!

Then.

He took out the Infinite Dao Fruit, revealing a look of pity.

If he raises the eighth sequence of supreme rules to the realm of ten percent, and then goes to the bottleneck, he can not only break the shackles of cultivation, but also break the shackles of supreme dao rules and comprehend the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules.

But.

There was no time for him to grow up slowly.

So, he has to take it now.

Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed this Infinite Dao Fruit in one go.

In an instant, with the help of the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit, his comprehension was raised to an extremely terrifying level, and he also saw the Supreme Dao Rules of a higher and more profound realm, which was the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

With the help of such a terrifying understanding, to personally comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme path, one can imagine how terrifying progress is.

"It's no wonder that the Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit can have a fifty percent chance of allowing the Sixth Rank Supreme Dao Realm to comprehend the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao Rules, but unfortunately, it is impossible for me to comprehend the seventh Sequence Supreme Dao rules now, so I can only comprehend the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules as much as possible. Ye Tian said darkly.

He devoted himself to comprehending the rules of the eighth sequence of supreme paths, and as for cultivation, he easily broke through by taking advantage of the situation.

Rumble!!!!

He broke the bottleneck of the Dual Dao Realm, easily shattered the shackles, and his cultivation quickly improved to the early stage of the Dual Dao Realm, and his strength was soaring all the time.

I don't know how long it has been.

this day.

The Infinite Dao Fruit had exhausted its energy and had been completely exhausted by refining.

At this time, Ye Tian's face showed excitement.

"The Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules have risen sharply!"

Ye Tian was excited.

He calculated that his Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule had been raised to the realm of seventy out of two, what a rapid progress!

As for cultivation, it is just to break through to the level of the double supreme realm, after all, the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit is mainly used to improve the rules of the Dao, not to improve the cultivation, it is good to be able to break the realm.

"With my current strength, it is enough to become a fivefold supreme void demon in an instant, and I have also accumulated a lot of combat exploits over the years, so I can go to Taisu Battle City to exchange for a lot of resources!"

Ye Tian stabilized his cultivation a little, and then went to Taisu Battle City.

......

Taisu Battle City.

At this time, the Supreme Dao Realm here was expressionless, obviously it was the defeat of these years again and again, which led to the fall of many Supreme Dao Realms, it was strange that they could have a good expression!

When Ye Tian came to Taisu Battle City, he felt the depression here, and he could even feel the panic, uneasiness, and despair in the hearts of every Zhidao Realm.

He didn't think too much about it, and soon came to the Taisu Battle Hall, where the exchange of battle merit resources was carried out.

Walking into the Taisu War Palace, a staff member was handling the battle merit exchange business for some Dao realms.

Soon, it was Ye Tian's turn.

When Ye Tian took out the pseudo battlefield order and asked the staff member to check it, the other party quickly showed a shocked look.

Subsequently.

She continued to check and confirmed that it was correct.

However, he couldn't believe it at all, so he secretly summoned the high-level of the Taisu War Palace, that is, a fifth-level Dao realm of the Taisu Palace.

After all, this battle feat is not at all like what a twofold Dao realm can do, it is simply too exaggerated.

How many Supreme Dao Void Demons do you have to kill to get so many battle merits!

Swish!

A Fivefold Dao Realm appeared beside the staff member, and she took over.

"Your Excellency, you have obtained a total of 136,500 battle exploits, and since there are too many battle exploits, we need to verify them. This Taisu Palace Fivefold Dao Realm said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian said it didn't matter.

Although it may lead to the exposure of his identity this time, it will definitely be exposed later, at most, it will be exposed in advance.

......

"A Twofold Dao Realm has obtained 130,000 battle merits???"

When the Longqin Palace Lord heard this information, he was immediately shocked.

Subsequently, she urged Taisu Palace's six-pattern supreme dao weapon, Wan Yanjing, to deduce it.

"It's true!"

Suddenly, he became curious about Ye Tian.

And so.

Her gaze passed through the Taisu Battle Hall and looked at Ye Tian.

Even if Ye Tian was a little disguised, she couldn't hide it in the eyes of the Longqin Palace Lord, and the Supreme Dao rules she mastered were even stronger than Ye Tian's Supreme Dao rules.

In an instant, Ye Tian's true face was exposed.

She didn't know Ye Tian, but she could investigate it according to Ye Tian's aura and appearance.

Soon, the results of the investigation came in.

There is no information about Ye Tian in the Infinite Domain, but the Infinite Heavenly Palace once wanted Ye Tian, which can be queried.

After all, there was a lot of uproar about this incident at the beginning, and it was easy to find out.

"I offended the Wuji Heavenly Palace, but I haven't died yet!"

The Longqin Palace Lord wanted to see Ye Tian.

......

After Ye Tian's combat exploits were confirmed, let Ye Tian choose the resource reward.

More than 100,000 military exploits are enough to exchange for a lot of good things and resources.

"Do you have any secret techniques or treasures to find the most strange things?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Finding the ???? of the Dao Treasures"

Taisu Palace's Fivefold Dao Realm is confused, what is this requirement?

However, merit can be exchanged for everything, as it was said at the beginning.

Unless it is too rare or not allowed to be exchanged, it will not be exchanged.

However, Ye Tian's request does not belong to the category of prohibited exchange.

"Yes!" said the five-fold Dao realm: "The strange things of the Dao are very hidden, even if we enter the strange place where the strange things of the Dao can be born, only the strange things of the Dao come to us, it is difficult for us to take the initiative to encounter the strange things of the Dao, but the major forces continue to research, and they have also created secret techniques that can sense the strange things of the Dao, but these secret techniques are very precious and very chicken. Are you sure you really want to redeem it?"

"Sure!"

Ye Tian affirmed.

This kind of secret technique is very weak for other supreme realms, but it is very important to him.

If he had such a secret technique, he could find more Supreme Dao Strange Objects in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and after killing them, he would be able to obtain more Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, so that the Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule could progress rapidly.
